policy.xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<wsp:Policy xmlns:L7p="http://www.layer7tech.com/ws/policy" xmlns:wsp="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2002/12/policy">
    <wsp:All wsp:Usage="Required">
        <wsp:OneOrMore wsp:Usage="Required">
            <wsp:All wsp:Usage="Required">
                <L7p:Encapsulated>
                    <L7p:EncapsulatedAssertionConfigGuid stringValue="393bcb93-82ad-4b55-8333-1119f607a560"/>
                    <L7p:EncapsulatedAssertionConfigName stringValue="OTK Require OAuth 2.0 Token"/>
                    <L7p:Parameters mapValue="included">
                        <L7p:entry>
                            <L7p:key stringValue="any_resource_required"/>
                            <L7p:value stringValue="false"/>
                        </L7p:entry>
                        <L7p:entry>
                            <L7p:key stringValue="cache_lifetime"/>
                            <L7p:value stringValue="3000"/>
                        </L7p:entry>
                        <L7p:entry>
                            <L7p:key stringValue="custom"/>
                            <L7p:value stringValue=""/>
                        </L7p:entry>
                        <L7p:entry>
                            <L7p:key stringValue="disable_audience_check"/>
                            <L7p:value stringValue="false"/>
                        </L7p:entry>
                        <L7p:entry>
                            <L7p:key stringValue="disallow_query"/>
                            <L7p:value stringValue="false"/>
                        </L7p:entry>
                        <L7p:entry>
                            <L7p:key stringValue="given_access_token"/>
                            <L7p:value stringValue=""/>
                        </L7p:entry>
                        <L7p:entry>
                            <L7p:key stringValue="onetime"/>
                            <L7p:value stringValue="false"/>
                        </L7p:entry>
                        <L7p:entry>
                            <L7p:key stringValue="resource_required"/>
                            <L7p:value stringValue=""/>
                        </L7p:entry>
                        <L7p:entry>
                            <L7p:key stringValue="scope_fail"/>
                            <L7p:value stringValue="false"/>
                        </L7p:entry>
                        <L7p:entry>
                            <L7p:key stringValue="scope_required"/>
                            <L7p:value stringValue="oob"/>
                        </L7p:entry>
                    </L7p:Parameters>
                </L7p:Encapsulated>
                <L7p:HardcodedResponse>
                    <L7p:Base64ResponseBody stringValue="VmFsaWQgYmVhcmVyIHRva2VuLg=="/>
                    <L7p:ResponseContentType stringValue="text/plain; charset=UTF-8"/>
                </L7p:HardcodedResponse>
            </wsp:All>
            <L7p:HardcodedResponse>
                <L7p:Base64ResponseBody stringValue="SW52YWxpZCBiZWFyZXIgdG9rZW4u"/>
                <L7p:ResponseContentType stringValue="text/plain; charset=UTF-8"/>
            </L7p:HardcodedResponse>
        </wsp:OneOrMore>
    </wsp:All>
</wsp:Policy>

encassConfigs.name: OTK SCOPE Verification
encassConfigs.description: Verifies SCOPE and fails if the requested SCOPE does not match the granted one.

encassArgs.name: any
encassArgs.guiLabel: Pass if any of the required SCOPEs are found (true|false)?

encassArgs.name: fail
encassArgs.guiLabel: Fail if the SCOPE is found (true|false)?

properties.name: doc_in_scope.granted
properties.value: A space separated list of granted/ valid SCOPE values

properties.name: doc_in_scope.required
properties.value: A space separated list of required SCOPE values

encassConfigs.name: OTK Profile Configuration
encassConfigs.description: Used to define the OTK OAUTH2 Server running profile.

encassConfigs.name: OTK OVP Configuration
encassConfigs.description: Exports the server location that implements the OVP (OAuth Validation Point) endpoints.

encassConfigs.name: OTK Validate JWT OAuth Token
encassConfigs.description: This encapsulated assertion is used to validate JWT as OAuth Token. Customization to the default implementation can be done in the configuration policy #OTK Validate JWT OAuth Token

encassConfigs.name: OTK OAuth 2.0 Token Validation - MAC
encassConfigs.description: Validates a given MAC token profile access_token.

encassConfigs.name: OTK OAuth 2.0 Token Validation - BEARER
encassConfigs.description: Validates a given Bearer token profile access_token.

encassArgs.name: any_resource_required
encassArgs.guiLabel: Pass if any of the required RESOURCEs are found (true|false)?

encassConfigs.name: OTK Variable Configuration
encassConfigs.description: Exports variables that are required to process OAuth requests.

encassConfigs.name: OTK Cache Look Up
encassConfigs.description: Looks Up an item associated with key: cacheKey in cache with ID: cacheID and returns it in values, if the item exists.

encassArgs.name: cacheKey
encassArgs.guiLabel: The Cache Key (identifier) for this entry (required)

encassArgs.name: maxEntryAge
encassArgs.guiLabel: Max. entry age in seconds (optional if a default value exists)

encassConfigs.name: OTK Access Token Retrieval
encassConfigs.description: Finds the OAuth 2.0 access_token within the http request header, as http request parameter or uses the given one. If will fail if a token is found at multiple locations.

encassConfigs.name: OTK Cache Store
encassConfigs.description: Writes an item to cache with ID: cacheID with key: cacheKey.  If the cache does not exist, one will be created.  If the key exists, the existing item will be overwritten.

encassArgs.name: cacheKey
encassArgs.guiLabel: The Cache Key (identifier) for this entry (required)

encassArgs.name: maxEntries
encassArgs.guiLabel: Max. number of entries for this cache (optional if a default value exists)

encassArgs.name: maxEntryAge
encassArgs.guiLabel: Max. entry age in seconds (optional if a default value exists)

encassArgs.name: maxEntrySize
encassArgs.guiLabel: Max. size for each entry (optional if a default value exists)

encassArgs.name: msg
encassArgs.guiLabel: The message to be cached (required, must exist in the preceeding policy context)

encassConfigs.name: OTK Client GET
encassConfigs.description: Retrieves values about the given client (or client_id) using the input parameters.

properties.name: doc_in_operation
properties.value: Use 'get' to retrieve client values, 'getKey' for client_id values. 'getAll' is only valid in combination with 'Client ID'

encassConfigs.name: OTK Storage Configuration
encassConfigs.description: Exports variables that contain OTK configurations that are related to the persistence layer

encassConfigs.name: OTK HTTP Routing Util
encassConfigs.description: Reusable Utility Encaps to call Internal GW

encassArgs.name: request_headers
encassArgs.guiLabel: Any additional headers to be passed

encassConfigs.name: OTK Encode base64url
encassConfigs.description: This encass converts base64 encoded string to base64url encoded string

encassConfigs.name: OTK Fail with error message
encassConfigs.description: This assertion returns an error message, http status and content-type value associated with the given 'Error code'.

properties.name: doc_in_apiPrefix
properties.value: A value combined with the given error code. If, for example, an API would be identifiedby the values '1234' and the given error code is '111' the exported variable 'error.code' would contain '1234111'

properties.name: doc_in_givenErrorCode
properties.value: A value associated with a certain error. If that value is unkown it will be replaced with '000' within the output variable 'error.code'

encassConfigs.name: OTK Require OAuth 2.0 Token
encassConfigs.description: Validates an OAuth 2.0 access_token for a request. By default the request will fail if the given access_token has expired or does not match the given configuration.

encassArgs.name: any_resource_required
encassArgs.guiLabel: Pass if any of the required audience are found ?

encassArgs.name: disallow_query
encassArgs.guiLabel: Disallow retrieving access_token from query string

encassArgs.name: scope_fail
encassArgs.guiLabel: Fail if this SCOPE was granted?

properties.name: doc_in_cache_lifetime
properties.value: Time in seconds for which the access_token will not be validated again. Use this value as a compromise between increasing performance and security. A typical value would be '30'

properties.name: doc_in_given_access_token
properties.value: Use this field if no access_token is received through the request message but was issued out-of-band

properties.name: doc_in_onetime
properties.value: If set to 'true' the access_token (and the associated refresh_token) will be invalidated after being used once. Default = 'false'

properties.name: doc_in_scope_fail
properties.value: If set to 'true' the assertion fails if the given SCOPE was granted for this access_token

properties.name: doc_in_scope_required
properties.value: A space separated list of SCOPE values this access_token MUST have been granted for

properties.name: doc_out_content-type
properties.value: The content-type of the 'error.msg' if it exists

properties.name: doc_out_session.client_id
properties.value: The client_id for which the access_token was granted

properties.name: doc_out_session.custom
properties.value: A JSON structure containing the used grant_type, the client_type and values specified in the custom field of the associated client_id

properties.name: doc_out_session.scope
properties.value: The SCOPE that was granted to the access_token

properties.name: doc_out_session.subscriber_id
properties.value: The user who granted the access_token/ client

encassConfigs.name: OTK Token Get (token)
encassConfigs.description: Retrieves long living tokens from the token database.

encassConfigs.name: OTK Token DB GET
encassConfigs.description: Returns values from the token database. 'tokentype' can either be 'token' or 'temporary'.

encassConfigs.name: OTK Client DB GET
encassConfigs.description: Retrieves client values from the persistence layer. To find out how the parameters can by used refer to the OTK API documentation.

encassConfigs.name: OTK v2GenerateRequestMac
encassConfigs.description: Generates request MAC using HMAC-SHA1 algorithm

encassConfigs.name: OTK Token Delete
encassConfigs.description: Deletes a token from the persistence layer.

encassConfigs.name: OTK Token DB Delete
encassConfigs.description: Deletes token from the persistence layer.

<wsp:Policy xmlns:L7p="http://www.layer7tech.com/ws/policy" xmlns:wsp="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2002/12/policy">
    <wsp:All wsp:Usage="Required">
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue=" ============================================"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue=" === ***  THIS POLICY IS READ ONLY ***"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue=" === If you have the need to customize this policy"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue=" === please contact CA APIM Support so we can improve customization capability"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue=" ============================================"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="Validates OAuth 2.0 Bearer tokens only"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:Encapsulated>
            <L7p:EncapsulatedAssertionConfigGuid stringValue="2e6e2ef3-a36f-4548-a2c4-7b369b7ae184"/>
            <L7p:EncapsulatedAssertionConfigName stringValue="OTK Variable Configuration"/>
        </L7p:Encapsulated>
        <L7p:SetVariable>
            <L7p:Base64Expression stringValue="JHt0b2tlblZhbHVlcy5tYWlucGFydH0="/>
            <L7p:ContentType stringValue="text/xml;charset=UTF-8"/>
            <L7p:DataType variableDataType="message"/>
            <L7p:VariableToSet stringValue="tokenValues"/>
        </L7p:SetVariable>
        <L7p:SetVariable>
            <L7p:Base64Expression stringValue=""/>
            <L7p:VariableToSet stringValue="content-type"/>
        </L7p:SetVariable>
        <L7p:SetVariable>
            <L7p:AssertionComment assertionComment="included">
                <L7p:Properties mapValue="included">
                    <L7p:entry>
                        <L7p:key stringValue="LEFT.COMMENT"/>
                        <L7p:value stringValue="initialize"/>
                    </L7p:entry>
                    <L7p:entry>
                        <L7p:key stringValue="RIGHT.COMMENT"/>
                        <L7p:value stringValue="overwritten in the case of an error"/>
                    </L7p:entry>
                </L7p:Properties>
            </L7p:AssertionComment>
            <L7p:Base64Expression stringValue=""/>
            <L7p:VariableToSet stringValue="error.code"/>
        </L7p:SetVariable>
        <wsp:OneOrMore wsp:Usage="Required">
            <wsp:All wsp:Usage="Required">
                <L7p:ComparisonAssertion>
                    <L7p:CaseSensitive booleanValue="false"/>
                    <L7p:Expression1 stringValue="${oauth2_token_type}"/>
                    <L7p:Expression2 stringValue="BEARER"/>
                    <L7p:Predicates predicates="included">
                        <L7p:item binary="included">
                            <L7p:CaseSensitive booleanValue="false"/>
                            <L7p:RightValue stringValue="BEARER"/>
                        </L7p:item>
                    </L7p:Predicates>
                </L7p:ComparisonAssertion>
                <L7p:ResponseXpathAssertion>
                    <L7p:VariablePrefix stringValue="xpathExpiration"/>
                    <L7p:XmlMsgSrc stringValue="tokenValues"/>
                    <L7p:XpathExpression xpathExpressionValue="included">
                        <L7p:Expression stringValue="/ns:values/ns:value/ns:expiration/text()"/>
                        <L7p:Namespaces mapValue="included">
                            <L7p:entry>
                                <L7p:key stringValue="ns"/>
                                <L7p:value stringValue="http://ns.l7tech.com/2012/11/otk-tokenstore"/>
                            </L7p:entry>
                            <L7p:entry>
                                <L7p:key stringValue="s"/>
                                <L7p:value stringValue="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"/>
                            </L7p:entry>
                        </L7p:Namespaces>
                        <L7p:XpathVersion xpathVersion="XPATH_1_0"/>
                    </L7p:XpathExpression>
                </L7p:ResponseXpathAssertion>
                <L7p:ResponseXpathAssertion>
                    <L7p:VariablePrefix stringValue="xpathScope"/>
                    <L7p:XmlMsgSrc stringValue="tokenValues"/>
                    <L7p:XpathExpression xpathExpressionValue="included">
                        <L7p:Expression stringValue="/ns:values/ns:value/ns:scope/text()"/>
                        <L7p:Namespaces mapValue="included">
                            <L7p:entry>
                                <L7p:key stringValue="ns"/>
                                <L7p:value stringValue="http://ns.l7tech.com/2012/11/otk-tokenstore"/>
                            </L7p:entry>
                            <L7p:entry>
                                <L7p:key stringValue="s"/>
                                <L7p:value stringValue="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"/>
                            </L7p:entry>
                        </L7p:Namespaces>
                        <L7p:XpathVersion xpathVersion="XPATH_1_0"/>
                    </L7p:XpathExpression>
                </L7p:ResponseXpathAssertion>
                <wsp:OneOrMore wsp:Usage="Required">
                    <L7p:ResponseXpathAssertion>
                        <L7p:VariablePrefix stringValue="xpathResource"/>
                        <L7p:XmlMsgSrc stringValue="tokenValues"/>
                        <L7p:XpathExpression xpathExpressionValue="included">
                            <L7p:Expression stringValue="/ns:values/ns:value/ns:resource/text()"/>
                            <L7p:Namespaces mapValue="included">
                                <L7p:entry>
                                    <L7p:key stringValue="ns"/>
                                    <L7p:value stringValue="http://ns.l7tech.com/2012/11/otk-tokenstore"/>
                                </L7p:entry>
                                <L7p:entry>
                                    <L7p:key stringValue="s"/>
                                    <L7p:value stringValue="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"/>
                                </L7p:entry>
                            </L7p:Namespaces>
                            <L7p:XpathVersion xpathVersion="XPATH_1_0"/>
                        </L7p:XpathExpression>
                    </L7p:ResponseXpathAssertion>
                    <L7p:TrueAssertion/>
                </wsp:OneOrMore>
                <L7p:ResponseXpathAssertion>
                    <L7p:VariablePrefix stringValue="xpathStatus"/>
                    <L7p:XmlMsgSrc stringValue="tokenValues"/>
                    <L7p:XpathExpression xpathExpressionValue="included">
                        <L7p:Expression stringValue="/ns:values/ns:value/ns:status/text()"/>
                        <L7p:Namespaces mapValue="included">
                            <L7p:entry>
                                <L7p:key stringValue="ns"/>
                                <L7p:value stringValue="http://ns.l7tech.com/2012/11/otk-tokenstore"/>
                            </L7p:entry>
                            <L7p:entry>
                                <L7p:key stringValue="s"/>
                                <L7p:value stringValue="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"/>
                            </L7p:entry>
                        </L7p:Namespaces>
                        <L7p:XpathVersion xpathVersion="XPATH_1_0"/>
                    </L7p:XpathExpression>
                </L7p:ResponseXpathAssertion>
                <L7p:ResponseXpathAssertion>
                    <L7p:VariablePrefix stringValue="xpathClientKey"/>
                    <L7p:XmlMsgSrc stringValue="tokenValues"/>
                    <L7p:XpathExpression xpathExpressionValue="included">
                        <L7p:Expression stringValue="/ns:values/ns:value/ns:client_key/text()"/>
                        <L7p:Namespaces mapValue="included">
                            <L7p:entry>
                                <L7p:key stringValue="ns"/>
                                <L7p:value stringValue="http://ns.l7tech.com/2012/11/otk-tokenstore"/>
                            </L7p:entry>
                            <L7p:entry>
                                <L7p:key stringValue="s"/>
                                <L7p:value stringValue="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"/>
                            </L7p:entry>
                        </L7p:Namespaces>
                        <L7p:XpathVersion xpathVersion="XPATH_1_0"/>
                    </L7p:XpathExpression>
                </L7p:ResponseXpathAssertion>
                <L7p:ResponseXpathAssertion>
                    <L7p:VariablePrefix stringValue="xpathOwner"/>
                    <L7p:XmlMsgSrc stringValue="tokenValues"/>
                    <L7p:XpathExpression xpathExpressionValue="included">
                        <L7p:Expression stringValue="/ns:values/ns:value/ns:resource_owner/text()"/>
                        <L7p:Namespaces mapValue="included">
                            <L7p:entry>
                                <L7p:key stringValue="ns"/>
                                <L7p:value stringValue="http://ns.l7tech.com/2012/11/otk-tokenstore"/>
                            </L7p:entry>
                            <L7p:entry>
                                <L7p:key stringValue="s"/>
                                <L7p:value stringValue="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"/>
                            </L7p:entry>
                        </L7p:Namespaces>
                        <L7p:XpathVersion xpathVersion="XPATH_1_0"/>
                    </L7p:XpathExpression>
                </L7p:ResponseXpathAssertion>
                <L7p:ResponseXpathAssertion>
                    <L7p:VariablePrefix stringValue="xpathCustom"/>
                    <L7p:XmlMsgSrc stringValue="tokenValues"/>
                    <L7p:XpathExpression xpathExpressionValue="included">
                        <L7p:Expression stringValue="/ns:values/ns:value/ns:custom"/>
                        <L7p:Namespaces mapValue="included">
                            <L7p:entry>
                                <L7p:key stringValue="ns"/>
                                <L7p:value stringValue="http://ns.l7tech.com/2012/11/otk-tokenstore"/>
                            </L7p:entry>
                            <L7p:entry>
                                <L7p:key stringValue="s"/>
                                <L7p:value stringValue="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"/>
                            </L7p:entry>
                        </L7p:Namespaces>
                        <L7p:XpathVersion xpathVersion="XPATH_1_0"/>
                    </L7p:XpathExpression>
                </L7p:ResponseXpathAssertion>
                <L7p:assertionComment>
                    <L7p:Properties mapValue="included">
                        <L7p:entry>
                            <L7p:key stringValue="LEFT.COMMENT"/>
                            <L7p:value stringValue="success"/>
                        </L7p:entry>
                    </L7p:Properties>
                </L7p:assertionComment>
            </wsp:All>
            <wsp:All wsp:Usage="Required">
                <L7p:AuditDetailAssertion>
                    <L7p:Detail stringValue="error: invalid_request, error_description: Access token does not exist (expired, revoked, replaced, unknown, ...). access_token='${access_token}'"/>
                </L7p:AuditDetailAssertion>
                <L7p:SetVariable>
                    <L7p:Base64Expression stringValue="OTkw"/>
                    <L7p:VariableToSet stringValue="error.code"/>

                <L7p:FalseAssertion/>
                <L7p:assertionComment>
                    <L7p:Properties mapValue="included">
                        <L7p:entry>
                            <L7p:key stringValue="LEFT.COMMENT"/>
                            <L7p:value stringValue="error"/>
                        </L7p:entry>

            </wsp:All>
            <L7p:assertionComment>
                <L7p:Properties mapValue="included">
                    <L7p:entry>
                        <L7p:key stringValue="LEFT.COMMENT"/>
                        <L7p:value stringValue="extract values"/>
                    </L7p:entry>
                </L7p:Properties>
            </L7p:assertionComment>
        </wsp:OneOrMore>
        <wsp:OneOrMore wsp:Usage="Required">
            <wsp:All wsp:Usage="Required">
                <L7p:SetVariable>
                    <L7p:Base64Expression stringValue=""/>
                    <L7p:DataType variableDataType="dateTime"/>
                    <L7p:DateOffsetExpression stringValue=""/>
                    <L7p:VariableToSet stringValue="now"/>

                <L7p:ComparisonAssertion>
                    <L7p:CaseSensitive booleanValue="false"/>
                    <L7p:Expression1 stringValue="${now.seconds}"/>
                    <L7p:Operator operatorNull="null"/>
                    <L7p:Predicates predicates="included">
                        <L7p:item dataType="included">
                            <L7p:Type variableDataType="int"/>
                        </L7p:item>
                        <L7p:item binary="included">
                            <L7p:CaseSensitive booleanValue="false"/>
                            <L7p:Operator operator="LE"/>
                            <L7p:RightValue stringValue="${xpathExpiration.result}"/>
                        </L7p:item>
                    </L7p:Predicates>
                </L7p:ComparisonAssertion>
                <L7p:assertionComment>
                    <L7p:Properties mapValue="included">

                            <L7p:value stringValue="success"/>
                        </L7p:entry>
                    </L7p:Properties>
                </L7p:assertionComment>

            <wsp:All wsp:Usage="Required">

                <L7p:SetVariable>
                    <L7p:Base64Expression stringValue="OTkw"/>
                    <L7p:VariableToSet stringValue="error.code"/>
                </L7p:SetVariable>
                <L7p:FalseAssertion/>
                <L7p:assertionComment>
                    <L7p:Properties mapValue="included">
                        <L7p:entry>
                            <L7p:key stringValue="LEFT.COMMENT"/>
                            <L7p:value stringValue="error"/>
                        </L7p:entry>
                    </L7p:Properties>
                </L7p:assertionComment>
            </wsp:All>
            <L7p:assertionComment>
                <L7p:Properties mapValue="included">
                    <L7p:entry>
                        <L7p:key stringValue="LEFT.COMMENT"/>
                        <L7p:value stringValue="expiration"/>
                    </L7p:entry>
                </L7p:Properties>
            </L7p:assertionComment>
        </wsp:OneOrMore>
        <wsp:OneOrMore wsp:Usage="Required">
            <L7p:ComparisonAssertion>
                <L7p:Expression1 stringValue="${oauth2_mtls_enable_thumbprint_validation}"/>
                <L7p:Expression2 stringValue="false"/>
                <L7p:Predicates predicates="included">
                    <L7p:item binary="included">
                        <L7p:RightValue stringValue="false"/>
                    </L7p:item>
                </L7p:Predicates>
            </L7p:ComparisonAssertion>
            <wsp:All wsp:Usage="Required">
                <L7p:SetVariable>
                    <L7p:Base64Expression stringValue="JHt4cGF0aEN1c3RvbS5yZXN1bHR9"/>
                    <L7p:ContentType stringValue="application/json; charset=utf-8"/>
                    <L7p:DataType variableDataType="message"/>
                    <L7p:VariableToSet stringValue="registered_token_all_custom"/>
                </L7p:SetVariable>
                <wsp:OneOrMore wsp:Usage="Required">
                    <L7p:ComparisonAssertion>
                        <L7p:Expression1 stringValue="${client_cert_base64}"/>
                        <L7p:Expression2 stringValue=""/>
                        <L7p:Operator operator="EMPTY"/>
                        <L7p:Predicates predicates="included">
                            <L7p:item binary="included">
                                <L7p:Operator operator="EMPTY"/>
                                <L7p:RightValue stringValue=""/>
                            </L7p:item>
                        </L7p:Predicates>
                    </L7p:ComparisonAssertion>
                    <L7p:EncodeDecode>
                        <L7p:CharacterEncoding stringValueNull="null"/>
                        <L7p:SourceVariableName stringValue="client_cert_base64"/>
                        <L7p:TargetDataType variableDataType="cert"/>
                        <L7p:TargetVariableName stringValue="client_cert"/>
                        <L7p:TransformType transformType="BASE64_DECODE"/>
                    </L7p:EncodeDecode>
                    <L7p:TrueAssertion/>
                </wsp:OneOrMore>
                <wsp:OneOrMore wsp:Usage="Required">
                    <wsp:All wsp:Usage="Required">
                        <L7p:EvaluateJsonPathExpressionV2>

                </xsl:for-each>

<wsp:Policy xmlns:L7p="http://www.layer7tech.com/ws/policy" xmlns:wsp="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2002/12/policy">
    <wsp:All wsp:Usage="Required">
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="**********************************************"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <wsp:All wsp:Usage="Required">
            <L7p:CommentAssertion>
                <L7p:Comment stringValue="This policy gets executed whenever an OTK Cache * assertion is used."/>
            </L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:CommentAssertion>
                <L7p:Comment stringValue="This policy can be modified in order to set default configuration values for caches that are introduced."/>
            </L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:CommentAssertion>
                <L7p:Comment stringValue="For each cache follow the example shown below:"/>
            </L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:CommentAssertion>
                <L7p:Comment stringValue="- Add an 'All assertions must evaluate to true' assertion"/>
            </L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:CommentAssertion>
                <L7p:Comment stringValue="- Check for the cacheID (name) and set values appropriately"/>
            </L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:CommentAssertion>
                <L7p:Comment stringValue="**"/>
            </L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:CommentAssertion>
                <L7p:Comment stringValue="***** OTK Cache Look Up Customization *****"/>
            </L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:CommentAssertion>
                <L7p:Comment stringValue="** Customizable hook for cache lookup.  This is used by OTK Cache Handler as a policy fragment"/>
            </L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:CommentAssertion>
                <L7p:Comment stringValue="** Available context variables:"/>
            </L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:CommentAssertion>
                <L7p:Comment stringValue="** cacheID (String) - the ID of the cache to be stored"/>
            </L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:CommentAssertion>
                <L7p:Comment stringValue="** cacheKey - the key associated with the value to be looked up"/>
            </L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:CommentAssertion>
                <L7p:Comment stringValue="** maxEntryAge - the max age in seconds for entries into this cache"/>
            </L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:CommentAssertion>
                <L7p:Comment stringValue="**"/>
            </L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:CommentAssertion>
                <L7p:Comment stringValue="***** OTK Cache Store Customization *****"/>
            </L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:CommentAssertion>
                <L7p:Comment stringValue="** Customizable hook for cache store.  This is used by OTK Cache Handler as a policy fragment, and is called for REMOVE, STORE and FLUSH operations"/>
            </L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:CommentAssertion>
                <L7p:Comment stringValue="** Available context variables:"/>
            </L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:CommentAssertion>
                <L7p:Comment stringValue="** cacheID (String) - the ID of the cache to be stored"/>
            </L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:CommentAssertion>
                <L7p:Comment stringValue="** cacheKey - the key associated with the given value for the cache identified by cacheID"/>
            </L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:CommentAssertion>
                <L7p:Comment stringValue="** maxEntries - the maximum number of entries allowed in the cache.  Adding more than this limit would force some existing items to be removed."/>
            </L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:CommentAssertion>
                <L7p:Comment stringValue="** maxEntryAge - the max age in seconds for entries into this cache"/>
            </L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:CommentAssertion>
                <L7p:Comment stringValue="** maxEntrySize - the maximum size in bytes allowable for the value"/>
            </L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:CommentAssertion>
                <L7p:Comment stringValue="**********************************************"/>
            </L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:CommentAssertion>
                <L7p:Comment stringValue="** NOTE:  only one maxEntryAge, maxEntrySize and maxEntries value is supported per cacheID "/>
            </L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:CommentAssertion>
                <L7p:Comment stringValue="** Changing any of these values after the cache has been created will result in the cache configuration being updated."/>
            </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        </wsp:All>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="**********************************************"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <wsp:OneOrMore L7p:Enabled="false" wsp:Usage="Required">
            <wsp:All wsp:Usage="Required">
                <L7p:ComparisonAssertion>
                    <L7p:CaseSensitive booleanValue="false"/>
                    <L7p:Expression1 stringValue="${cacheID}"/>
                    <L7p:Expression2 stringValue="myCache"/>
                    <L7p:Predicates predicates="included">
                        <L7p:item binary="included">
                            <L7p:CaseSensitive booleanValue="false"/>
                            <L7p:RightValue stringValue="myCache"/>
                        </L7p:item>
                    </L7p:Predicates>
                </L7p:ComparisonAssertion>
                <wsp:OneOrMore wsp:Usage="Required">
                    <L7p:ComparisonAssertion>
                        <L7p:CaseSensitive booleanValue="false"/>
                        <L7p:Expression1 stringValue="${maxEntryAge}"/>
                        <L7p:Expression2 stringValue=""/>
                        <L7p:Negate booleanValue="true"/>
                        <L7p:Operator operator="EMPTY"/>
                        <L7p:Predicates predicates="included">
                            <L7p:item binary="included">
                                <L7p:CaseSensitive booleanValue="false"/>
                                <L7p:Negated booleanValue="true"/>
                                <L7p:Operator operator="EMPTY"/>

                    </L7p:ComparisonAssertion>
                    <L7p:SetVariable>

                                <L7p:entry>
                                    <L7p:key stringValue="LEFT.COMMENT"/>
                                    <L7p:value stringValue="new"/>
                                </L7p:entry>
                                <L7p:entry>
                                    <L7p:key stringValue="RIGHT.COMMENT"/>
                                    <L7p:value stringValue="// configure the new lifetime"/>
                                </L7p:entry>
                            </L7p:Properties>
                        </L7p:AssertionComment>
                        <L7p:Base64Expression stringValue="MTIwMA=="/>
                        <L7p:VariableToSet stringValue="maxEntryAge"/>
                    </L7p:SetVariable>
                    <L7p:assertionComment>
                        <L7p:Properties mapValue="included">
                            <L7p:entry>
                                <L7p:key stringValue="LEFT.COMMENT"/>
                                <L7p:value stringValue="maxEntryAge"/>
                            </L7p:entry>
                            <L7p:entry>
                                <L7p:key stringValue="RIGHT.COMMENT"/>
                                <L7p:value stringValue="// check if an entryAge has been given"/>
                            </L7p:entry>
                        </L7p:Properties>
                    </L7p:assertionComment>
                </wsp:OneOrMore>
                <L7p:SetVariable>
                    <L7p:AssertionComment assertionComment="included">
                        <L7p:Properties mapValue="included">
                            <L7p:entry>

                                <L7p:value stringValue="new"/>
                            </L7p:entry>
                            <L7p:entry>
                                <L7p:key stringValue="RIGHT.COMMENT"/>
                                <L7p:value stringValue="// configure number of valid entries"/>
                            </L7p:entry>
                        </L7p:Properties>
                    </L7p:AssertionComment>
                    <L7p:Base64Expression stringValue="MTAw"/>
                    <L7p:VariableToSet stringValue="maxEntries"/>
                </L7p:SetVariable>
                <L7p:SetVariable>
                    <L7p:AssertionComment assertionComment="included">
                        <L7p:Properties mapValue="included">

                                <L7p:key stringValue="LEFT.COMMENT"/>
                                <L7p:value stringValue="new"/>
                            </L7p:entry>
                            <L7p:entry>
                                <L7p:key stringValue="RIGHT.COMMENT"/>
                                <L7p:value stringValue="// configure entrySize for cache entries"/>
                            </L7p:entry>
                        </L7p:Properties>
                    </L7p:AssertionComment>
                    <L7p:Base64Expression stringValue="MTAwMDA="/>
                    <L7p:VariableToSet stringValue="maxEntrySize"/>
                </L7p:SetVariable>
                <L7p:assertionComment>
                    <L7p:Properties mapValue="included">
                        <L7p:entry>
                            <L7p:key stringValue="LEFT.COMMENT"/>
                            <L7p:value stringValue="myCache"/>
                        </L7p:entry>
                        <L7p:entry>
                            <L7p:key stringValue="RIGHT.COMMENT"/>
                            <L7p:value stringValue="// sample configuration where a given maxEntryAge is accepted but maxEntrySize, maxEntries given in the Cache UI are being ignored"/>
                        </L7p:entry>
                    </L7p:Properties>
                </L7p:assertionComment>
            </wsp:All>
            <wsp:All wsp:Usage="Required">
                <L7p:ComparisonAssertion>
                    <L7p:CaseSensitive booleanValue="false"/>
                    <L7p:Expression1 stringValue="${cacheID}"/>
                    <L7p:Expression2 stringValue="anotherCache"/>

                <L7p:SetVariable>

                            <L7p:entry>
                                <L7p:key stringValue="LEFT.COMMENT"/>
                                <L7p:value stringValue="new"/>

                    <L7p:VariableToSet stringValue="maxEntryAge"/>
                </L7p:SetVariable>
                <L7p:SetVariable>
                    <L7p:AssertionComment assertionComment="included">
                        <L7p:Properties mapValue="included">
                            <L7p:entry>
                                <L7p:key stringValue="LEFT.COMMENT"/>
                                <L7p:value stringValue="new"/>
                            </L7p:entry>
                            <L7p:entry>
                                <L7p:key stringValue="RIGHT.COMMENT"/>

                            </L7p:entry>

                    <L7p:VariableToSet stringValue="maxEntries"/>

                <L7p:SetVariable>
                    <L7p:AssertionComment assertionComment="included">
                        <L7p:Properties mapValue="included">
                            <L7p:entry>

<wsp:Policy xmlns:L7p="http://www.layer7tech.com/ws/policy" xmlns:wsp="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2002/12/policy">
    <wsp:All wsp:Usage="Required">
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="***** OTK Cache Store Customization *****"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="**********************************************"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="** Available context variables:"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="** cacheID (String) - the ID of the cache to be stored"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="** cacheKey - the key associated with the given value for the cache identified by cacheID"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="** maxEntries - the maximum number of entries allowed in the cache.  Adding more than this limit would force some existing items to be removed."/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="** maxEntryAge - the maximum length (seconds) to keep entries in the cache.  "/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="** maxEntrySize - the maximum size in bytes allowable for the value"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="**"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="** Replace the assertion below if desired with an assertion that support key- value data structures"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="** If this assertion is replaced also replace it at 'OTK Cache Look Up Customization'"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CacheStorage>
            <L7p:CacheEntryKey stringValue="${cacheKey}"/>
            <L7p:CacheId stringValue="${actualCacheID}"/>
            <L7p:MaxEntries stringValue="${maxEntries}"/>
            <L7p:MaxEntryAgeSeconds stringValue="${maxEntryAge}"/>
            <L7p:MaxEntrySizeBytes stringValue="${maxEntrySize}"/>
            <L7p:OtherTargetMessageVariable stringValue="msg"/>
            <L7p:Target target="OTHER"/>
        </L7p:CacheStorage>
    </wsp:All>
</wsp:Policy>

<wsp:Policy xmlns:L7p="http://www.layer7tech.com/ws/policy" xmlns:wsp="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2002/12/policy">
    <wsp:All wsp:Usage="Required">

            <L7p:Comment stringValue="Policy Fragment: #OTK Validate JWT OAuth Token"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="Private key to decode JWT can be modified in the below assertion."/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:DecodeJsonWebToken>
            <L7p:FailUnverifiedSignature booleanValue="true"/>
            <L7p:KeyAlias stringValue="ssl"/>
            <L7p:KeyGoid goidValue="00000000000000000000000000000002"/>
            <L7p:SourcePayload stringValue="${access_token}"/>
            <L7p:TargetVariablePrefix stringValue="jwt"/>
            <L7p:ValidationType stringValue="Using Recipient Key From List"/>
        </L7p:DecodeJsonWebToken>
        <L7p:SetVariable>
            <L7p:AssertionComment assertionComment="included">
                <L7p:Properties mapValue="included">
                    <L7p:entry>
                        <L7p:key stringValue="RIGHT.COMMENT"/>
                        <L7p:value stringValue="convert payload to json, to extract values in the next steps"/>
                    </L7p:entry>
                </L7p:Properties>
            </L7p:AssertionComment>
            <L7p:Base64Expression stringValue="JHtqd3QucGF5bG9hZH0="/>
            <L7p:ContentType stringValue="application/json; charset=utf-8"/>
            <L7p:DataType variableDataType="message"/>
            <L7p:VariableToSet stringValue="payload_json"/>
        </L7p:SetVariable>
        <L7p:EvaluateJsonPathExpressionV2>
            <L7p:AssertionComment assertionComment="included">
                <L7p:Properties mapValue="included">
                    <L7p:entry>
                        <L7p:key stringValue="RIGHT.COMMENT"/>
                        <L7p:value stringValue="// extract JTI which is also the access_token"/>
                    </L7p:entry>
                </L7p:Properties>
            </L7p:AssertionComment>
            <L7p:Expression stringValue="jti"/>
            <L7p:OtherTargetMessageVariable stringValue="payload_json"/>
            <L7p:Target target="OTHER"/>
            <L7p:VariablePrefix stringValue="jti"/>
        </L7p:EvaluateJsonPathExpressionV2>
        <L7p:EvaluateJsonPathExpressionV2>
            <L7p:AssertionComment assertionComment="included">
                <L7p:Properties mapValue="included">
                    <L7p:entry>
                        <L7p:key stringValue="RIGHT.COMMENT"/>
                        <L7p:value stringValue="// extract hte issuer (iss)"/>
                    </L7p:entry>
                </L7p:Properties>
            </L7p:AssertionComment>
            <L7p:Expression stringValue="iss"/>
            <L7p:OtherTargetMessageVariable stringValue="payload_json"/>
            <L7p:Target target="OTHER"/>
            <L7p:VariablePrefix stringValue="iss"/>
        </L7p:EvaluateJsonPathExpressionV2>
        <L7p:EvaluateJsonPathExpressionV2>
            <L7p:AssertionComment assertionComment="included">
                <L7p:Properties mapValue="included">
                    <L7p:entry>
                        <L7p:key stringValue="RIGHT.COMMENT"/>
                        <L7p:value stringValue="// extract the audience (aud)"/>
                    </L7p:entry>
                </L7p:Properties>
            </L7p:AssertionComment>
            <L7p:Expression stringValue="aud"/>
            <L7p:OtherTargetMessageVariable stringValue="payload_json"/>
            <L7p:Target target="OTHER"/>
            <L7p:VariablePrefix stringValue="aud"/>
        </L7p:EvaluateJsonPathExpressionV2>
        <L7p:EvaluateJsonPathExpressionV2>
            <L7p:AssertionComment assertionComment="included">
                <L7p:Properties mapValue="included">
                    <L7p:entry>
                        <L7p:key stringValue="RIGHT.COMMENT"/>
                        <L7p:value stringValue="// extract expiration (exp)"/>
                    </L7p:entry>

            </L7p:AssertionComment>
            <L7p:Expression stringValue="exp"/>
            <L7p:OtherTargetMessageVariable stringValue="payload_json"/>
            <L7p:Target target="OTHER"/>
            <L7p:VariablePrefix stringValue="exp"/>
        </L7p:EvaluateJsonPathExpressionV2>
        <L7p:EvaluateJsonPathExpressionV2>
            <L7p:AssertionComment assertionComment="included">
                <L7p:Properties mapValue="included">
                    <L7p:entry>
                        <L7p:key stringValue="RIGHT.COMMENT"/>
                        <L7p:value stringValue="// extract the SCOPE that was granted for this token"/>
                    </L7p:entry>
                </L7p:Properties>
            </L7p:AssertionComment>
            <L7p:Expression stringValue="token_details.scope"/>
            <L7p:OtherTargetMessageVariable stringValue="payload_json"/>
            <L7p:Target target="OTHER"/>
            <L7p:VariablePrefix stringValue="scope"/>
        </L7p:EvaluateJsonPathExpressionV2>
        <L7p:EvaluateJsonPathExpressionV2>
            <L7p:AssertionComment assertionComment="included">
                <L7p:Properties mapValue="included">

                        <L7p:key stringValue="RIGHT.COMMENT"/>
                        <L7p:value stringValue="// extract the Client_key associated with the token"/>
                    </L7p:entry>

            </L7p:AssertionComment>
            <L7p:Expression stringValue="token_details.client_key"/>
            <L7p:OtherTargetMessageVariable stringValue="payload_json"/>
            <L7p:Target target="OTHER"/>
            <L7p:VariablePrefix stringValue="client_key"/>
        </L7p:EvaluateJsonPathExpressionV2>
        <wsp:OneOrMore wsp:Usage="Required">

                <L7p:OtherTargetMessageVariable stringValue="payload_json"/>

                <L7p:VariablePrefix stringValue="owner"/>
            </L7p:EvaluateJsonPathExpressionV2>
            <L7p:SetVariable>

                    <L7p:Properties mapValue="included">

                            <L7p:key stringValue="RIGHT.COMMENT"/>

                </L7p:AssertionComment>
                <L7p:Base64Expression stringValue="dW5rbm93bg=="/>

            <L7p:assertionComment>

        <L7p:SetVariable>

                <L7p:Properties mapValue="included">
                    <L7p:entry>
                        <L7p:key stringValue="RIGHT.COMMENT"/>

            </L7p:AssertionComment>
            <L7p:Base64Expression stringValue=""/>
            <L7p:ContentType stringValue="text/xml; charset=utf-8"/>
            <L7p:DataType variableDataType="message"/>
            <L7p:VariableToSet stringValue="resp"/>
        </L7p:SetVariable>
        <L7p:SetVariable>
            <L7p:Base64Expression stringValue="JHtnYXRld2F5Lm90ay5hY2Nlc3NfdG9rZW4uZW5hYmxlX2p3dC5xdWVyeV9kYn0="/>

<wsp:Policy xmlns:L7p="http://www.layer7tech.com/ws/policy" xmlns:wsp="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2002/12/policy">
    <wsp:All wsp:Usage="Required">
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="***** OTK Cache Look Up Customization *****"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="** Available context variables:"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="** cacheID (String) - the ID of the cache to be stored"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="** cacheKey - the key associated with the value to be looked up"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="** maxEntryAge - the max age that the cache was originally created with"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="**"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="** Must return:  the variable 'resp' as a Message for found content"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="** Must fail if the looked up value does not exist!"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="**"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="** Replace the assertion below if desired with an assertion that supports key- value data structures"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="** If this assertion is replaced also replace it at 'OTK Cache Store Customization'"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CacheLookup>
            <L7p:CacheEntryKey stringValue="${cacheKey}"/>
            <L7p:CacheId stringValue="${actualCacheID}"/>
            <L7p:ContentTypeOverride stringValue=""/>
            <L7p:MaxEntryAgeSeconds stringValue="${maxEntryAge}"/>
            <L7p:OtherTargetMessageVariable stringValue="resp"/>
            <L7p:Target target="OTHER"/>
        </L7p:CacheLookup>
    </wsp:All>
</wsp:Policy>

<wsp:Policy xmlns:L7p="http://www.layer7tech.com/ws/policy" xmlns:wsp="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2002/12/policy">
    <wsp:All wsp:Usage="Required">
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="Policy Fragment: OTK Encode base64url"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue=" ============================================"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue=" === ***  THIS POLICY IS READ ONLY ***"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue=" === please contact CA APIM Support so we can improve customization capability"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue=" ============================================"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="This fragment should be used as an encapsulated assertion"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="This fragment will convert base64 encoded string to bas64url encoded string"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:SetVariable>
            <L7p:Base64Expression stringValue="JHtiYXNlNjRfZW5jb2RlZH0="/>
            <L7p:VariableToSet stringValue="base64url_encoded"/>
        </L7p:SetVariable>
        <L7p:Regex>
            <L7p:AssertionComment assertionComment="included">
                <L7p:Properties mapValue="included">
                    <L7p:entry>
                        <L7p:key stringValue="RIGHT.COMMENT"/>
                        <L7p:value stringValue="replace plus with -"/>
                    </L7p:entry>
                </L7p:Properties>
            </L7p:AssertionComment>
            <L7p:AutoTarget booleanValue="false"/>
            <L7p:OtherTargetMessageVariable stringValue="base64url_encoded"/>
            <L7p:Regex stringValue="\+"/>
            <L7p:Replace booleanValue="true"/>
            <L7p:Replacement stringValue="-"/>
            <L7p:Target target="OTHER"/>
        </L7p:Regex>
        <L7p:Regex>
            <L7p:AssertionComment assertionComment="included">
                <L7p:Properties mapValue="included">
                    <L7p:entry>
                        <L7p:key stringValue="RIGHT.COMMENT"/>
                        <L7p:value stringValue="replace forward slash with _"/>
                    </L7p:entry>
                </L7p:Properties>
            </L7p:AssertionComment>
            <L7p:AutoTarget booleanValue="false"/>
            <L7p:OtherTargetMessageVariable stringValue="base64url_encoded"/>
            <L7p:Regex stringValue="\/"/>
            <L7p:Replace booleanValue="true"/>
            <L7p:Replacement stringValue="_"/>
            <L7p:Target target="OTHER"/>
        </L7p:Regex>
        <L7p:Regex>
            <L7p:AssertionComment assertionComment="included">
                <L7p:Properties mapValue="included">
                    <L7p:entry>
                        <L7p:key stringValue="RIGHT.COMMENT"/>
                        <L7p:value stringValue="remove  ="/>
                    </L7p:entry>
                </L7p:Properties>
            </L7p:AssertionComment>
            <L7p:AutoTarget booleanValue="false"/>
            <L7p:OtherTargetMessageVariable stringValue="base64url_encoded"/>
            <L7p:Regex stringValue="\="/>
            <L7p:Replace booleanValue="true"/>
            <L7p:Replacement stringValue=""/>
            <L7p:Target target="OTHER"/>
        </L7p:Regex>
    </wsp:All>
</wsp:Policy>

<wsp:Policy xmlns:L7p="http://www.layer7tech.com/ws/policy" xmlns:wsp="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2002/12/policy">
    <wsp:All wsp:Usage="Required">
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue=" ============================================"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue=" === ***  THIS POLICY IS READ ONLY ***"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue=" === If you have the need to customize this policy"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue=" === please contact CA APIM Support so we can improve customization capability"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue=" ============================================"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="***** OTK Cache Look Up ********************"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="** Looks up a cache value from the cache identified by cacheID and maxEntryAge by key: cacheKey."/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="**********************************************"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <wsp:OneOrMore wsp:Usage="Required">
            <wsp:All wsp:Usage="Required">
                <L7p:ComparisonAssertion>
                    <L7p:CaseSensitive booleanValue="false"/>
                    <L7p:Expression1 stringValue="${cacheID}"/>
                    <L7p:MultivaluedComparison multivaluedComparison="FAIL"/>
                    <L7p:Operator operatorNull="null"/>
                    <L7p:Predicates predicates="included">
                        <L7p:item dataType="included">
                            <L7p:Type variableDataType="string"/>
                        </L7p:item>

                                    <L7p:SqlQuery stringValueReference="inline"><![CDATA[SELECT ock.client_key, ock.secret,

                                    <L7p:ConvertVariablesToStrings booleanValue="false"/>
                                    <L7p:GenerateXmlResult booleanValue="true"/>
                                    <L7p:MaxRecords intValue="1000"/>
                                    <L7p:SqlQuery stringValueReference="inline"><![CDATA[SELECT client_key, secret, scope, callback, environment, expiration, secret_expiration, status, client_ident, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE('19700101000000', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')+(created/(60*60*24)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as created, created_by, client_name, custom, serviceIds, accountPlanMappingIds, masterkey_flag, hashing_metadata, resources

                                    <L7p:SqlQuery stringValueReference="inline"><![CDATA[SELECT  client_ident, name, type,
